key_excerpts.text: AI SDK 6 Introducing agents, tool execution approval, DevTools, full MCP support, reranking, image editing, and more. With over 20 million monthly downloads and adoption by teams ranging from startups to Fortune 500 companies, the AI SDK is the leading TypeScript toolkit for building AI applications. It provides a unified API, allowing you to integrate with any AI provider, and seamlessly integrates with Next.js, React, Svelte, Vue, and Node.js.
